translations.en: I want to call you later.
translations.he: אני רוצה להתקשר אליך אחר כך.
translations.vi: Tôi muốn gọi cho bạn sau.
translations.hi: मैं बाद में तुम्हें फोन करना चाहता हूँ.
translations.el: Θέλω να σε πάρω τηλέφωνο αργότερα.
translations.ro: Vreau să te sun mai târziu.
translations.da: Jeg vil ringe til dig senere.
translations.ja: あとで電話したいです。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular nominative personal pronoun; subject of the clause; controls agreement on the modal auxiliary.
Present indicative, 1st person singular of the modal 'wollen'; expresses intention; selects a bare infinitive complement ('anrufen'); finite verb in V2 position.
2nd person singular accusative personal pronoun; direct object of the infinitive verb 'anrufen'.
Temporal adverb specifying the time of the action; modifies the clause.
Bare infinitive of a separable verb; complements the modal 'will'; not split here due to infinitival form; denotes the action of phoning.

sentences.target: Du kannst mich heute Abend anrufen.

translations.de: Du kannst mich heute Abend anrufen.
translations.en: You can call me this evening.
translations.zh-Hans: 你今晚可以给我打电话。
translations.ru: Ты можешь позвонить мне сегодня вечером.
translations.pt: Você pode me ligar hoje à noite.
translations.vi: Bạn có thể gọi cho tôi tối nay.
translations.uk: Ти можеш подзвонити мені сьогодні ввечері.
translations.hi: तुम आज शाम मुझे फोन कर सकते हो.
translations.pl: Możesz do mnie zadzwonić dziś wieczorem.
translations.el: Μπορείς να με πάρεις τηλέφωνο σήμερα το βράδυ.
translations.nb: Du kan ringe meg i kveld.
translations.id: Kamu bisa menelepon aku malam ini.
translations.sv: Du kan ringa mig i kväll.
translations.da: Du kan ringe til mig i aften.
translations.ja: 今夜は電話してもいいです。

tokens.explanation: 2nd person singular nominative personal pronoun; subject of the clause; controls agreement on the modal auxiliary.
Present indicative, 2nd person singular of the modal 'können'; expresses ability/possibility; selects a bare infinitive complement ('anrufen').
1st person singular accusative personal pronoun; direct object of the infinitive verb 'anrufen'.
Temporal adverb; forms part of the time expression 'heute Abend', functioning adverbially.
Temporal common noun; together with 'heute' forms the time expression 'heute Abend' used adverbially.
Bare infinitive of a separable verb; complements the modal 'kannst'; not split in infinitival position; denotes phoning.

sentences.target: Er kann mich jetzt nicht anrufen.

translations.de: Er kann mich jetzt nicht anrufen.
translations.en: He can't call me right now.
translations.es: Él no puede llamarme ahora mismo.
translations.fr: Il ne peut pas m'appeler maintenant.
translations.ko: 그는 지금 저에게 전화할 수 없어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 他现在不能给我打电话。
translations.ru: Он не может позвонить мне сейчас.
translations.pt: Ele não pode me ligar agora.
translations.he: הוא לא יכול להתקשר אליי עכשיו.
translations.vi: Bây giờ anh ấy không thể gọi cho tôi.
translations.ar: هو لا يستطيع الاتصال بي الآن.
translations.nl: Hij kan me nu niet bellen.
translations.uk: Він не може подзвонити мені зараз.
translations.hi: वह अभी मुझे फोन नहीं कर सकता.
translations.pl: On nie może teraz do mnie zadzwonić.
translations.el: Δεν μπορεί να μου τηλεφωνήσει τώρα.
translations.nb: Han kan ikke ringe meg nå.
translations.id: Dia tidak bisa menelepon saya sekarang.
translations.sv: Han kan inte ringa mig nu.
translations.ro: El nu poate să mă sune acum.
translations.da: Han kan ikke ringe til mig nu.
translations.fi: Hän ei voi soittaa minulle nyt.
translations.ja: 彼は今私に電話できません。

tokens.explanation: 3rd person singular nominative personal pronoun; subject of the clause; controls agreement on the modal auxiliary.
Present indicative, 3rd person singular of the modal 'können'; expresses ability/possibility; selects a bare infinitive complement ('anrufen').
1st person singular accusative personal pronoun; direct object of the infinitive verb 'anrufen'.
Temporal adverb indicating the current time; modifies the clause.
Negation particle; scopes over the clause/VP to negate the proposition (here, the ability to call now).
Bare infinitive of a separable verb; complements the modal 'kann'; not split due to infinitival form; denotes phoning.

translations.en: I have to call my father.
translations.es: Tengo que llamar a mi padre.
translations.pt: Eu tenho que ligar para o meu pai.
translations.vi: Tôi phải gọi cho bố tôi.
translations.hi: मुझे अपने पिताजी को फोन करना है.
translations.el: Πρέπει να πάρω τηλέφωνο τον πατέρα μου.
translations.nb: Jeg må ringe til faren min.
translations.ro: Trebuie să-l sun pe tatăl meu.
translations.da: Jeg skal ringe til min far.
translations.ja: 父に電話しないといけません。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular nominative personal pronoun; subject of the clause; controls agreement on the modal auxiliary.
Present indicative, 1st person singular of the modal 'müssen'; expresses necessity/obligation; selects a bare infinitive complement ('anrufen').
Possessive determiner inflected for accusative masculine singular; modifies 'Vater' to indicate possession by the speaker.
Common noun, masculine; direct object (accusative) of the infinitive verb 'anrufen'.
Bare infinitive of a separable verb; complements the modal 'muss'; not split here due to infinitival form; denotes phoning.

He can't call me right now.
I have to call my father.

Bạn có thể gọi cho tôi tối nay.
Bây giờ anh ấy không thể gọi cho tôi.
Tôi phải gọi cho bố tôi.

तुम आज शाम मुझे फोन कर सकते हो.
